stemHtml: To meet the balked landing requirements an aircraft (Class A) must achieve a climb gradient of…

options.a: 2.1% in the landing configuration with all engines operating
options.b: 2.5% in the landing configuration with the critical engine inoperative
options.c: 3.8% in the approach configuration with all engines operating
options.d: 3.2% in the landing configuration with all engines operating
